candidate_llm_application: LLM token-emission cadence as escapement: discrete energy release per generation step, isochronous regardless of token complexity; reduces variance in inter-token latency.

results.title: Inference Latency Control: Survey
results.snippet: This 2025-2026 paper presents work on inference latency control, covering LLM-side mechanisms that achieve similar functional outcomes via alternative terminology.
